description: Style Note shorts are the coolest bottoms to wear this season - and perhaps the most versatile too. Slip into this pair from adidas when on a long journey, a casual day at home or at the gym. Engineered with Climalite technology, the fabric will whisk away the sweat and keep you dry and fresh through the day. Pair them with sports shoes or flip flops to suit the occasion. Product Details Black shorts, has blue patterned prints on the left thigh, blue panels at the back at the hem, soft elasticated waist band, one pocket on either side in front and branding above the hem on the right Material and Care 100% polyester Wash cold with like colours Do not bleach, soak or tumble dry Dry inside out in shade Use cold iron Size and Fit Regular fit The model (height 6' and waist 32") is wearing a size M
